name: Constellation
description: Stars strung together with hairline sight-lines — every redraw charts the sky anew, brightening some stars and re-aiming the lines.

code.style: --star: @p(var(--color1), var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3)); --ang: @rand(360deg); --len: @rand(34%, 86%); --rule: ( /* line and star share one emitted anchor so the line always leaves the star */ --sx: @r(14, 64); --sy: @r(14, 64); @random(0.72) { :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: calc(@var(--sx) * 1% + 3%); top: calc(@var(--sy) * 1% + 3%); width: var(--len); height: calc(11px / @Y); background: var(--color1); opacity: @rand(0.18, 0.4); transform-origin: 0 50%; transform: rotate(var(--ang)); transition: ease 700ms; } } @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: calc(@var(--sx) * 1%); top: calc(@var(--sy) * 1%); @size: @rand(4%, 9%); border-radius: 50%; background: var(--star); box-shadow: 0 0 calc(60px / @Y) var(--color1); transition: ease 700ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
